name: com.reromanlee.consolecontainer
description: Per-context logging containers that keep debug output out of the Unity Console. Create named console instances, view them in a dedicated editor window with chronological merging and IDE call-stack navigation, and optionally forward messages to Debug logs in player builds.

samples.description: A MonoBehaviour that spins up several named console instances and logs to them continuously — including from a background thread — to showcase the Console Viewer.
